foundry-tile-highlight-module.settings.d: Used when a scene has no explicit setting.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.settings.t: Outline follows non-transparent pixels (PNG/WebP). Videos use the rectangle.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.settings.a: Pixels with alpha ≥ this are opaque.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.settings.s: Display the tile's name on hover.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.settings.c: Upload or link your own font files.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.customFont: Add font families and the path/URL to a .woff/.woff2/.ttf/.otf file. Use the picker to upload via Foundry's file browser.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.settings.p: Send your client-scoped settings (color, thickness, font, label, etc.) to every connected player.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.push.warni: Once you've sent the settings to the players, you'll be able to change them. Before making any changes, first disable the forced settings.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.push.title: Push Settings
foundry-tile-highlight-module.push.body: Your appearance settings (outline color/thickness/opacity, trace, smoothness, label font/size/color, etc.) will be locked on every client. New players who join later get the same values automatically. Per-tile and per-scene settings are not affected.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.push.activ: Pushed settings are currently active. Players cannot override them locally.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.push.sent: Tile Hover Highlight settings pushed to players.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.push.clear: Pushed Tile Hover Highlight settings cleared.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.push.notGM: Only the GM can push settings.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.settings.l: Used when a tile has no per-tile size.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.scene.high: Permanently outline every visible tile on this scene. Hover highlight is disabled while this is on.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.tile.label: Tile name
Shown above the tile on hover. Empty = hidden.
Label size (px)
Override font size for this tile. Empty = use default.
foundry-tile-highlight-module.tile.visib: Who sees this tile's highlight (and its label).
